description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a dark brown fabric upholstery. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all with subtle piping along the edges for a refined look. The armrests are gently flared outward, providing a contemporary silhouette and comfortable support. The back and sides of the sofa are quilted with a subtle horizontal band detail, adding visual interest and texture. The legs are short and blocky, mostly concealed beneath the base, giving the sofa a grounded and sturdy appearance. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern, dark brown two-seater sofa with flared armrests, quilted sides, and large, piped cushions. Its sleek design and subtle detailing make it suitable for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, flared armrests, and subtle piping details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the outward flare of the armrest and the quilted side panel with a horizontal band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous quilted back with a horizontal band and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same flared armrest and quilted side panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, with visible piping along the edges.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, gently flared outward from the seat, medium height relative to the seat, with a smooth, continuous profile and subtle padding.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs mostly hidden beneath the sofa base, likely positioned at the corners for stability, with no visible decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, attached cushions, continuous and unsegmented, featuring subtle piping.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle quilted horizontal banding on the sides and back; visible piping detail on cushions.
